pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py expected output path.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh where CSV_FILE is set to this exact path and written to.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh where STIM_DIR is set to this exact path and populated with images.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated data created during setup. Shape images (circle, square, triangle) are generated via ImageMagick in '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli', and a CSV file containing mock Windows-style paths is created at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/legacy_conditions.csv'. The expected target path for the newly built experiment is '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/shape_task.psyexp'. All metadata paths match the implementation in the setup script.
